mapper.select: SELECT p.project_code ,p.project_name ,p.description ,p.created_on ,c.code_name ,p.user_code ,u.name ,u.phone ,u.email FROM projects p JOIN common_code c ON p.status = c.code_id JOIN users u ON p.user_code = u.user_code ORDER BY p.project_code
SELECT user_code ,employee_no ,name ,phone ,email ,created_at ,is_lock FROM users WHERE is_lock = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(project_code), 0) + 1 FROM projects
INSERT INTO projects ( project_code, project_name, description, created_on, status, user_code ) VALUES ( #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{description}, SYSDATE, #{status}, #{userCode} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(status_code), 0) + 1 FROM status
INSERT INTO status ( status_code, project_code, code_id, sort_no ) VALUES ( #{statusCode}, #{projectCode}, #{codeId}, #{sortNo} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(mapp_code), 0) + 1 FROM project_role_user
INSERT INTO project_role_user ( mapp_code, project_code, user_code, role_code ) VALUES ( #{mappCode}, #{projectCode}, #{userCode}, #{roleCode} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(gr_pro_code), 0) + 1 FROM gr_pro_role
INSERT INTO gr_pro_role ( gr_pro_code, gr_code, project_code, role_code ) VALUES ( #{grProCode}, #{grCode}, #{projectCode}, #{roleCode} )
